# Suspicious Activity

Acme Shop prioritizes your security by actively monitoring for suspicious login activity, such as logins from unfamiliar locations or devices. If such activity is detected, alerts are sent to your registered email and, if applicable, via SMS, detailing the attempt and prompting you to verify its legitimacy. If the login is unrecognized, you should change your password immediately, and Acme Shop may temporarily lock your account for security during the verification process, resolving typically within 24 hours. To enhance your security further, enabling [[two-factor-authentication]] is recommended, and customer support is available for assistance 24/7.

[Source: account_security.md#suspicious-activity]
